title: melastoma rugosum
intro: Melastoma rugosum, also known as the rough melastoma, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia and China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Melastoma rugosum include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. In traditional herbal preparations, Melastoma rugosum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics that are administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
